overview: QA Armor is an AI-powered QA testing dashboard that gives engineering teams real-time visibility into test health, coverage, and bug status. It features a dark-themed interface with interactive charts, a Kanban bug board, expandable test run tables, and an AI insights feed — all backed by realistic mock data.
features: Dashboard with KPI metrics, area chart, donut chart, and coverage heatmap
Test Suites grid with mini donut charts and suite-level stats
Test Runs table with expandable rows showing failed test details
Bug Reports Kanban board with drag-and-drop + list view toggle
AI Insights feed with filter tabs and timeline layout
Responsive layout: full sidebar on desktop, icon-only on tablet, hamburger on mobile
Dark theme with custom CSS variables and Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts
Notifications dropdown, toast notifications, and Run Tests loading simulation
